title: Glowing Ores without mods
description: Makes ores glow without any mods.
body:
Ores now glow using the newly added `light_emission` property in vanilla Minecraft.

Consequently, no external mods are required to enable this effect.

![Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8cd5d61896a73a033bba00b18066c235befe3ff_0.webp)
